title: General Pest Control in New Brunswick, NJ | $175–$300
metaDescription: Professional general pest control services in New Brunswick, NJ starting at $175. Serving Rutgers campus, downtown, and all neighborhoods. Licensed exterminators, same-day service available.
intro: New Brunswick residents and businesses face unique pest challenges due to the city's dense urban environment, historic buildings, and proximity to the Raritan River. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive general pest control services throughout New Brunswick, from the Rutgers University campus to the bustling downtown district and residential neighborhoods. Our experienced technicians deliver effective, affordable solutions starting at just $175–$300.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving New Brunswick and the greater New Jersey area with fast, reliable pest control solutions. We understand the specific pest pressures facing New Brunswick properties and use targeted treatments that are safe for families, pets, and the environment while delivering long-lasting results.
localContext: New Brunswick's mix of historic Victorian homes, modern high-rise apartments, college housing around Rutgers, and commercial establishments along George Street each present distinct pest control needs. Our technicians are familiar with everything from the older buildings near Joyce Kilmer Park to the newer developments along the Raritan waterfront, ensuring customized treatment plans for every property type.

faqs.question: What pests are most common in New Brunswick, NJ?
faqs.answer: New Brunswick properties commonly deal with ants, cockroaches, mice, rats, spiders, and bed bugs. The city's urban density, older building stock, and proximity to water sources create ideal conditions for these pests. Our general pest control service addresses all common household pests with comprehensive treatment plans.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide pest control service in New Brunswick?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to most New Brunswick locations, including downtown, the Rutgers campus area, and surrounding neighborhoods. Emergency services are available for urgent pest situations. Contact us before noon for potential same-day treatment.

faqs.question: Is your general pest control service safe for Rutgers students and families?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for homes, apartments, dormitories, and businesses when applied by our licensed professionals. We're experienced working in family homes and student housing throughout New Brunswick and can accommodate specific safety concerns or scheduling needs.

faqs.question: What does the $175–$300 price range include for general pest control?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service includes a thorough inspection, interior and exterior treatment, targeted application for common pests, and follow-up recommendations. The final price depends on your property size, infestation severity, and specific treatment needs. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees for all New Brunswick customers.
